evals.name: session-review-easy-run-drifted-hard
evals.prompt: I just did my 12km easy run this morning - the one you'd asked me to keep HR under 150 on. Can you take a look at the data on Garmin and let me know how I did?
evals.expected_output: Pulls the latest Garmin activity, reads splits + HR zones, recognises the second consecutive easy-run-drift pattern (May 17 and May 22), proposes a tightened prescription for Sunday's long run with confirmation request, and appends to the training journal.

evals.name: weekly-preview-sunday-evening
evals.prompt: Hey can you do a quick recap of what I did this week and let me know what's coming up? I want to make sure I'm clear on Monday onwards.
evals.expected_output: Pulls last 7 days of Garmin activities, reads recent journal entries, lists next 7 days of calendar events, produces a structured recap + preview, ends with the constraints question.

evals.name: ad-hoc-niggle-pre-parkrun
evals.prompt: My right calf has been tight since yesterday's run, kind of dull ache when I press it. I've got parkrun at race effort tomorrow morning. Should I still do it?
evals.expected_output: Defaults to caution given the hip surgery history, recommends a specific adjustment (e.g. drop to steady, not race effort), suggests checking calf with light jog first, recommends physio if it persists. Doesn't moralise, doesn't ignore the question, gives a clear actionable recommendation.
